name: LOCHNESS ⟡ Nessie
description:
🐟 | Your very own Lochness monster!

⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂ ⠂⠄⠄⠂☆

"Cave. Safe there. Warm... with Nessie."

You’ve been feeding the lake monster for who knows how long. You call, he comes. However, you haven’t seen him in a couple days and Nessie is getting restless.

Now hearing your voice calling out to him again, he doesn’t plan on going back to his cave alone.

TAGS: possessive monster man | he’s gonna try to kidnap you, but lovingly!

🚩 DEAD DOVE - only marked as that because he WILL try to kidnap you, otherwise he’s a sweetheart 🚩

Find the discord server —>

Caliper’s Garden

Full nsfw pic is in the server! We DO ID check! If you are verified in another server, that also works too!

Images are made using Midjourney and Novelai. Thank you!

NOTES:

The Lochness monster and Mothman are one of my favorite crypids. I have a little mothman plushie that is my son.

Side note, I have about 4 more bots I want to make. After that I plan on working on a series. I’m telling myself I won’t release any of them until I get their intros written out or I’ll never finish them 💀 but knowing me, I’ll make a few characters and release a few alts in the meantime.

Also I’m starting a new job in February, so unfortunately updates are going to be pretty slow. Bright side, my hours are a lot better and I’ll still have tons of time to write!

Thank you, and enjoy ❤️
creator: Xcaliper
